dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7447 IH: Community Risk Training and Response Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Pettersen introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To provide grants for technical assistance for State crisis intervention programs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Community Risk Training and Response Act of 2026.

The Attorney General shall make grants to States for a term of 1 year in an amount of not less than $200,000 and not more than $500,000 for purposes of providing technical assistance to State and local—

paragraph.text: agencies designated to coordinate extreme risk protection order implementation,

section.continuation-text: to develop standardized extreme risk protection order training, curriculum, and model implementation materials for States, and thereby to ensure consistent, evidence-based processes nationwide and support States in effective, timely implementation of State crisis intervention court proceedings and related programs or initiatives.
